title: Mailchimp tags?
excerpt:
When I add a donor to my board flow, does MC integration have the capability to TAG that donor as a Regular Supporter as opposed to a one-time gift? Thanks for any help you can give. 
mike

posts.author: MikeRosser (Mike Rosser)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I add a donor to my board flow, does MC integration have the capability to TAG that donor as a Regular Supporter as opposed to a one-time gift? Thanks for any help you can give.
mike

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MikeRosser,

Thank you for posting, and welcome to the community! This is a good question, and unfortunately there’s no way to tag a donor if you’re going from monday.com to Mailchimp.

The only integration that will go in the direction from monday.com to Mailchimp is this one:

It does not have any “mapping” (where column data from monday.com can transfer to fields in Mailchimp), so only the item name from monday.com will pull through.

posts.author: LindaRosado (LindaRosado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, it’s been 2 years since this question and I’m just wondering if there has been any kind on updates on the subject.
Thank you
